summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Addrika Gift Code System. All 10 backend tests passed. All 15 UI tests passed. Birthday=20%, Anniversary=15%, Festival=10% discount percentages verified across API and UI.

1_gift_codes_admin_tab_loads.details: Gift Codes tab loads with stats: Birthdays (7d), Anniversaries (7d), Birthday Uses, Anniversary Uses, Active Festival Codes

2_birthday_discount_20_percent.details: Birthday Discount shows '20% OFF' in admin config and returns 20 from API

3_anniversary_discount_15_percent.details: Anniversary Discount shows '15% OFF' in admin config and returns 15 from API

4_festival_discount_10_percent.details: Festival Codes section shows '10% OFF' and created codes validate with 10% discount

5_create_festival_code_via_ui.details: Created TESTDIWALIUI2026 via admin UI with toast notification 'Festival code TESTDIWALIUI2026 created!'

6_festival_code_appears_in_list.details: Newly created festival codes appear immediately in the active codes list with 10% OFF badge and Deactivate button

7_validate_festival_code_via_api.details: Festival codes (TESTDIWALIUI2026, HOLISPECIAL2026) validate via /api/discount-codes/validate returning 10% discount

8_happybday_requires_login.details: HAPPYBDAY code returns 401 'Please login to use this gift code' without authentication

9_anniversary_requires_login.details: ANNIVERSARY code returns 401 'Please login to use this gift code' without authentication

10_deactivate_festival_code.details: Deactivate button visible for all active festival codes, API endpoint /api/gift-codes/admin/festivals/deactivate/{code} works correctly

11_info_box_discount_percentages.details: Current Gift Code Configuration shows: Birthday=20% OFF, Anniversary=15% OFF, Code Validity=7 days

POST /api/discount-codes/validate?code=H.response: Please login to use this gift code

POST /api/discount-codes/validate?code=A.response: Please login to use this gift code

critical_code_review_comments: gift_code_service.py: BIRTHDAY_DISCOUNT_PERCENT=20, ANNIVERSARY_DISCOUNT_PERCENT=15, FESTIVAL_DISCOUNT_PERCENT=10 correctly configured
discounts.py: validate_discount_code() properly checks for HAPPYBDAY/ANNIVERSARY requiring login before validation
AdminDashboard.jsx: Gift Codes tab shows config section with correct discount percentages and festival code CRUD UI
seed_data_creation: Created festival codes: TESTDIWALIUI2026, TESTFEST* (multiple) during automated testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gift Code System fully verified: Birthday=20% (HAPPYBDAY), Anniversary=15% (ANNIVERSARY), Festival=10% (custom FESTIVALNAME2026). Admin can create/deactivate festival codes. Birthday/Anniversary require user login with DOB/Anniversary set in profile. Festival codes work for any user with universal usage type. All features working as specified in PRD.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected
